summary: `auth login --from-chrome` reads the freshest www.expensify.com authToken from Chrome's cookie store (newest by last_update_utc incl. the WAL sidecar; prefix-stripped v10 decrypt with PKCS#7 verification).
reason: A fresh login leaves stale authToken rows behind; selecting by value length grabbed an expired one, and a not-yet-checkpointed token lives only in the WAL sidecar.
